name: GTA 5 RPG
description:
This bot is re-uploaded as it was originally uploaded on my friend Morubi's account, but he decided to stop making bots. He asked me to upload his bots on my account.

I didn't change anything about this bot. Morubi made it this way, and I won't change it.

Does this mean I'm back from my hiatus? No. Read my latest bot here: omg

Original publication date: 26/10/24.

ORIGINAL DESCRIPTION

« Totally inspired by @SQuishSQuid's bots I hope you like it

Well I'm not very good at making rpg bots I hope the bot doesn't look too generic »
